rationale: Both candidates independently reconstruct the sole ground-truth insight (both submit_initial/submit_update reject list prompts regardless of already_submitted, so the gate removal is correct) and both reach the right verdict shape. X stays tightly grounded in diff-visible code (stage_pool.py line citations, DiffusionOutput dataclass shape) and lands on APPROVE, matching the actual LGTM x2 outcome. Y pads its review with unverifiable external claims (a specific GitHub user comment on issue #4839 about HunyuanImage-3.0) and a speculative nit contradicted by the actual DiffusionOutput dataclass (no .images field exists), which hurts precision and pushes its verdict to COMMENT, diverging from the real reviewers' consensus.
